commands.review_summary:
The branch migrates three script tests from direct `mkdtempSync` temp directory setup to `createTempDirTracker()` and extends the helper-change test routing expectation.

PR surface: Tests -4. Total -4 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a test cleanup rather than a reported runtime bug. The relevant verification is source inspection of current-main direct temp-dir usage, helper cleanup semantics, and the PR's targeted test/reporter commands.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the remaining action is protected-label maintainer review plus normal CI resolution.

target.title: test: use temp dir helper in script tests
target.body:
## Summary
- migrate three script tests from direct `mkdtempSync` temp directory creation to `createTempDirTracker()`
- keep the existing cleanup behavior while using the new test temp-dir helper path
- update the test-project routing expectation so `test/helpers/temp-dir.ts` changes include these new helper-backed importers
- provide a positive validation path for the temp-dir warning reporter: helper-backed changes should not emit CI annotations

## Verification
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run test/scripts/parallels-package-log-progress-extract.test.ts test/scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.test.ts test/scripts/plugin-lifecycle-measure.test.ts`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH GITHUB_ACTIONS=true node scripts/report-test-temp-creations.mjs --base origin/main --head HEAD --no-merge-base`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts test/scripts/parallels-package-log-progress-extract.test.ts test/scripts/plugin-lifecycle-measure.test.ts test/scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

Note: I first tried plain `pnpm exec vitest run ...`, but it hit a 180s timeout in this fresh worktree while spending time in build/plugin startup. The repository runner completed the same target tests successfully under Node 24.
target.author: hxy91819
